Scan to open on mobile

Pastebin

A real-time shared clipboard. Create a room and share text, images, and files between devices instantly.

Enter a room name then press Enter (or Return) to create or join a shared clipboard. Anyone using the same room name will see the same content in real time.

Room name rules: 1–32 characters. Letters (case sensitive), numbers, dashes, and underscores only. No spaces or special characters.

Note: This pastebin is ephemeral. Once all sessions are closed, the content is automatically erased. Nothing is stored permanently. You can also paste screenshots (Ctrl+V / Cmd+V) to share images, and upload text-based files (up to 7 MB). For privacy, use a hard-to-guess room name. Anyone who knows the room name can see and edit the content. This tool is provided as-is with no guarantees. Use at your own risk. Do not share sensitive information such as passwords or personal data.

📡 Connected Devices (0)

    1
    Press Ctrl+Enter (or ⌘+Enter on Mac) to send. Or click the Send button.

      Content too long for QR code. Use copy instead.

      Max 7 MB per file • Text files only (code, logs, config, documents, etc.)
